destinations.evidence: Storage layout pins callPredicates after executedBitmap and executedBitmapOverflow.
Predicate mapping slot derivation uses slot 5 explicitly.
Runtime filtering consumes the corrected slot helper when predicate checks are needed.
destinations.snippet: Scheduled predicate filtering reads predicate storage through the slot helper.

equivalence_argument: Exact mapping in port scheduled-verification storage layout and predicate-slot helper.
rationale: The slot correction is current storage-layout knowledge: callPredicates shifts after executedBitmap and executedBitmapOverflow occupy slots 3 and 4.
statement: At current tip, Rust scheduled verification must read Scheduler.callPredicates from storage slot 5, not slot 3, because executedBitmap and executedBitmapOverflow occupy slots 3 and 4.
suggested_falsification_tests: Store a nonzero predicate for a Scheduler call in callPredicates and assert Rust scheduled verification reads it from slot 5.
Assert slot 3 is treated as executedBitmap and is not interpreted as callPredicates after executedBitmap restoration.
summary: Call predicate storage follows executed bitmap slots in the port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Store predicate at Scheduler.callPredicates slot 5 and execution bitmap data at slots 3/4; assert predicate filtering reads slot 5 and does not treat slot 3 as predicate storage.
title: Call predicate storage follows executed bitmap slots
